title: rosa dumalis subsp. subcanina
intro: Rosa dumalis subsp. subcanina is a subspecies of the Rosa dumalis species, a type of wild rose native to the mountainous regions of Europe. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Rosa dumalis subsp. subcanina include soothing digestive issues, reducing fever, and alleviating respiratory problems such as bronchitis and coughs. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, allowing for a range of applications in natural remedies.
